name: wecom
description: WeCom self-built app callback channel for receiving and responding to Enterprise WeChat messages

auth.instructions: Create a WeCom self-built application, enable message callbacks, and collect Corp ID, Corp Secret, Agent ID, callback Token, and callback EncodingAESKey. This MVP uses HTTP callback + Agent API rather than the bot WebSocket path.
auth.token_hint: Corp ID looks like wwxxxx..., Agent ID is numeric, callback EncodingAESKey is 43 characters

required_secrets.name: wecom_corp_id
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WeCom Corp ID (for example wwxxxx...)

required_secrets.name: wecom_corp_secret
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WeCom self-built app Corp Secret

required_secrets.name: wecom_callback_encoding_aes_key
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your WeCom callback EncodingAESKey (43 chars)
